zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edwin Henry Rogers於1448年3月1日出生在英國多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親Sir John Rogers37歲，母親Anne Echingham20歲。他於1467年之前與Amy Stourton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1507年2月1日在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edwin Henry Rogers于1448年3月1日出生在英国多瑟特布陽斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John Rogers37岁，母亲Anne Echingham20岁。他于1467年之前与Amy Stourton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1507年2月1日在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Edwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + wine ‘friend’. It was borne by a 7th-century king of Northumbria, who was converted to Christianity by St Paulinus and was killed in battle against pagan forces, a combination of circumstances which led to his being venerated as a martyr. The name occurs occasionally from the mid 16th century, but in modern use it is largely the result of a 19th-century revival.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edwin Henry Rogers was born on 1 March 1448, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, his father, Sir John Rogers, was 37 and his mother, Anne Echingham, was 20. He married Amy Stourton before 1467. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 1 February 1507, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edwin Henry Rogers est né le 1 mars 1448, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Rogers, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne Echingham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Amy Stourton avant 1467. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 1 février 1507, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edwin Henry Rogers am 1. März 1448 in Bryanston, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Rogers 37 und seine Mutter Anne Echingham 20. Er hat vor 1467 Amy Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 1. Februar 1507 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edwin Henry Rogers è nato il il 1 marzo 1448 nel Bryanston, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Rogers, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Anne Echingham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Amy Stourton prima del 1467. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 1 febbraio 1507, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edwin Henry Rogersが1448年3月1日にイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Rogersは37歳，母Anne Echinghamは20歳であった。1467年以前にAmy Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1507年2月1日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edwin Henry Rogers(이)가 1448년 3월 1일 영국 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Rogers(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Echingham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1467년 이전 Amy Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1507년 2월 1일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 March 1448–1 February 1507: 1 de março de 1448–1 de fevereiro de 1507
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edwin Henry Rogers nasceu em 1 de março de 1448, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Rogers, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne Echingham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy Stourton antes 1467. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1507, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edwin Henry Rogers родился 1 марта 1448 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Rogers было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Echingham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Stourton перед 1467 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 1 февраля 1507 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Amy Stourton antes de 1467. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1507, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
